tags.name: Jo Betty Farm Road

tags.fixme: The sign says "flammables - explosives prohibited", but this isn't clear if it extends to call Class 4 hazmats (4.2 and 4.3 in addition to 4.1), while the NHMRR entry only breaks out by class, not division, and there's no sign of legislation or published
